mapper.select: WITH Results AS( SELECT TE001, TE002, TE023, TE005, TE008, TE017, TE009, TE019, TE018, MD002, e.UDF10, e.UDF09, MAX(status) AS status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TE023) AS RowNum FROM SFCTE AS e LEFT JOIN SFCTD AS d ON TE001 = TD001 AND TE002 = TD002 AND TE023 = TD003 LEFT JOIN CMSMD AS c ON e.UDF10 = MD001 OR e.UDF10 = MD002 lEFT JOIN QMSMG AS q ON e.TE017 = q.MG002 collate Chinese_PRC_BIN WHERE TE023 BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{EndTime} AND RTRIM(TE001)+'-'+RTRIM(TE002)+'-'+RTRIM(TE023)+'-'+'1'+'-'+RTRIM(TE008) = #{code} GROUP BY TE001,TE002,TE023,TE005,TE008,TE017,TE009,TE019,TE018,MD002,e.UDF10, e.UDF09 )SELECT * ,'0' AS status FROM Results

WITH Results AS (select *, (SELECT MW002 FROM CMSMW WHERE MW001 = TE009) AS name,(select ISNULL(SUM(TE011),0) from SFCTE where UDF09 = TE001 and UDF10 = TE002 and UDF11 = TE003) AS num from SFCTE where TE001 = 'D420' AND UDF08 != 'Y'
and TE002 LIKE '%'+#{dh}+'%'
and TE017 LIKE '%'+#{ph}+'%'
AND TE006 = '5101'
AND TE006 = '5102'
AND TE006 = '5103'
OR TE004 = #{code} ) SELECT * FROM Results WHERE TE011 > num order by TE003

SELECT TE001, TE002, TE023, TE005, TE008, TE017, TE009, TE019, TE018, MD002, e.UDF10, e.UDF09, MAX(status) AS status FROM SFCTE AS e LEFT JOIN SFCTD AS d ON TE001 = TD001 AND TE002 = TD002 AND TE023 = TD003 LEFT JOIN CMSMD AS c ON e.UDF10 = MD001 OR e.UDF10 = MD002 lEFT JOIN QMSMG AS q ON e.TE017 = q.MG002 collate Chinese_PRC_BIN WHERE MG020 = #{checky} AND TE001 = 'D420' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspectionHead ds WHERE ds.TA001 = TE001 COLLATE Chinese_PRC_BIN AND ds.TA002 = TE002 COLLATE Chinese_PRC_BIN AND ds.TA004 = TE009 COLLATE Chinese_PRC_BIN AND (SELECT top 1 MG020 FROM inspectionBody b WHERE ds.uid = b.i_uid) = #{checky}) = 0 AND TE023 BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{EndTime} and TE009 LIKE '%'+#{gy}+'%' and TE017 LIKE '%'+#{te017}+'%' and TE005 LIKE '%'+#{mv002}+'%' GROUP BY TE001,TE002,TE023,TE005,TE008,TE017,TE009,TE019,TE018,MD002,e.UDF10,e.UDF09

SELECT s.TA001,s.TA002,s.TA003,s.TA004,m.TA029,m.TA064,m.TA006,m.TA034,m.TA035,m.TA003 AS kgtime,m.TA015,m.TA011,m.TA007,s.TA007 AS gz,m.TA027 FROM SFCTA AS s LEFT JOIN MOCTA m ON s.TA001 = m.TA001 AND s.TA002 = m.TA002 WHERE m.TA011!='Y' AND m.TA011 != 'y'
AND m.TA001 LIKE '%'+#{TA001}+'%'
AND m.TA002 LIKE '%'+#{TA002}+'%'
AND m.TA006 LIKE '%'+#{TA006}+'%'
SELECT MW002 FROM CMSMW WHERE MW001 = #{MW001}

SELECT SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(UDF51+UDF52+UDF53),0)AS INT) count FROM SFCTE
AND UDF06 LIKE '%'+#{UDF06}+'%'
AND SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) BETWEEN SUBSTRING(#{start_time}, 1, ${type}) AND SUBSTRING(#{end_time}, 1, ${type})
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) ORDER BY SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type})

SELECT SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TE011),0) AS INT) count FROM SFCTE
AND UDF06 LIKE '%'+#{UDF06}+'%'
AND SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) BETWEEN SUBSTRING(#{start_time}, 1, ${type}) AND SUBSTRING(#{end_time}, 1, ${type})
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type}) ORDER BY SUBSTRING(CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type})

SELECT SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TE011),0) AS INT) count FROM SFCTE
AND UDF06 = #{UDF06}
AND (UDF06 = '一次测温' OR UDF06 = '三次测温')
AND SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(UDF51+UDF52+UDF53),0)AS INT) count FROM SFCTE
AND UDF06 = #{UDF06}
AND (UDF06 = '一次测温' OR UDF06 = '三次测温')
AND SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( CREATE_DATE, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TH003, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TI019),0)AS INT) count FROM MOCTH LEFT JOIN PURMA ON TH005 = MA001 LEFT JOIN MOCTI ON TH001 = TI001 AND TH002 = TI002
MA002 LIKE '%方同喜%' AND TH010 NOT LIKE '%脱漆%' AND TH023 = 'Y'
AND SUBSTRING ( TH003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TH003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TH003, 1, ${type} )

SELECT SUBSTRING ( TL003, 1, ${type} ) date,CAST(ROUND(SUM(TM007),0)AS INT) count FROM INVTL LEFT JOIN INVTM ON TM001 = TL001 AND TL002= TM002
TL009 = '二次测温不真空'
AND SUBSTRING ( TL003, 1, ${type} ) BETWEEN SUBSTRING ( #{start_time}, 1, ${type} ) AND SUBSTRING ( #{end_time}, 1, ${type} )
GROUP BY SUBSTRING ( TL003, 1, ${type} ) ORDER BY SUBSTRING ( TL003, 1, ${type} )
SELECT * FROM SFCTA_A WHERE MO_ROUTING_D_ID = #{id} ORDER BY ZGX
SELECT ISNULL(CAST(CAST(MAX(TE003) AS NUMERIC(11))+1 AS CHAR(11)),1) FROM SFCTE WHERE TE001 = #{TE001} AND TE002 = #{TE002}

WITH Results AS ( SELECT TA001+'-'+TA002 AS dh,TA027,TA006,TA034,TA035,TA007,TA015,TA003 AS kgtime, (SELECT ISNULL(MIN(TE011), 0) num FROM (SELECT SUM(TE011) TE011 FROM SFCTE WHERE TE006 = TA001 AND TE007 = TA002 AND TE008 = TA003 GROUP BY UDF09) A) AS num,TA011,TA064,TA029 FROM MOCTA WHERE TA011!='Y' AND TA011 != 'y'
AND TA001+'-'+TA002 LIKE '%'+#{dh}+'%'
AND TA006 LIKE '%'+#{ph}+'%'
AND TA034 LIKE '%'+#{pm}+'%'
AND TA001 + '-' + TA002 IN(SELECT TA001+'-'+TA002 FROM SFCTA WHERE TA004 LIKE '%'+#{gy}+'%')
AND TA003 LIKE '%'+#{kgtime}+'%'
)SELECT * FROM Results WHERE TA015 > num
